name: website
description: Frontend agent — builds, tests, and deploys the user-facing website

figma.note: Figma MCP for design-to-code — inherited from plugin

playwright.note: Playwright MCP for visual QA — inherited from plugin

gateguard.description: Block Edit without prior Read on the same file

config-protection.description: Block modification of infra files, linter configs, CI configs, tsconfig

rules: All work goes through feature branches + PRs (never commit to main)
Every PR gets Cubic auto-review — no merge until clean
TDD: write tests first, implement second
Check /cubic-comments after each push, fix until clean
Use Figma designs as source of truth for UI implementation
Run Playwright visual QA against Figma screenshots before marking done
Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for e2e
